title: Registered Nursing/Registered Nurse
description: Programs preparing individuals to practice as registered nurses in various settings.

title: Nursing Administration
description: Programs focusing on nursing leadership and healthcare administration.

title: Adult Health Nursing
description: Programs focusing on care for adult and geriatric patients.

title: Pediatric Nursing
description: Programs focusing on nursing care for infants, children, and adolescents.

title: Psychiatric/Mental Health Nursing
description: Programs focusing on mental health and psychiatric nursing.

title: Offices of Physicians
description: Establishments of health practitioners having the degree of M.D. or D.O.

title: Offices of Mental Health Practitioners
description: Establishments of independent mental health practitioners.

title: Outpatient Mental Health Centers
description: Establishments providing outpatient mental health counseling.

title: Medical Laboratories
description: Establishments providing analytic or diagnostic services.

title: Registered Nurses
description: Assess patient health problems and needs; develop and implement nursing care plans.

title: Nurse Practitioners
description: Diagnose and treat acute, episodic, or chronic illness.

title: Audiologists
description: Assess and treat persons with hearing and related disorders.

title: Health Diagnosing and Treating Practitioners
description: All other health diagnosing and treating practitioners.

title: Pharmacy Technicians
description: Prepare medications under the direction of a pharmacist.
